title: senecio jungei
intro: Senecio jungei, also known as Groundsel Tree, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio jungei include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Senecio jungei can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, often used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems, but its use should be limited due to potential toxicity and under medical supervision.
